evals.prompt: 我想系统学习分布式系统，帮我 decompose 一下
evals.expected_output: DAG with ≤15 nodes covering core distributed systems concepts (CAP, consensus, replication, etc.), with entry points, hub nodes marked, five-dimension assessments, and learning strategy suggestions

evals.prompt: decompose 密码学，我有一些基础，学过对称加密和哈希
evals.expected_output: DAG focusing on public-key cryptography, digital signatures, key exchange etc., with user's existing knowledge reflected in '当前距离' assessments, fewer entry-level nodes since user has basics

evals.prompt: 我要学机器学习入门，帮我规划学习路径
evals.expected_output: DAG covering ML fundamentals (linear regression, gradient descent, neural networks, etc.), reasonable five-dimension assessments, mix of red/yellow/green strategy suggestions
